name: Education & EdTech

users.context: Builds courses, posts assignments, grades submissions, gives feedback, and tracks attendance and progress. Time-poor, manages many students across sections, often grading in long batch sessions.
users.expertise: Domain expert in subject; variable LMS fluency. Needs efficient bulk grading and clear gradebook semantics.

users.context: Enrols in courses, consumes content, submits assignments, takes quizzes/exams, and checks grades. Wide age range, devices, and abilities; may have accommodations and varying connectivity.
users.expertise: Novice to intermediate; high stakes around deadlines and grades, sensitive to fairness.

users.context: Manages enrolment, course catalog, scheduling, transcripts, and academic records. Custodian of the official student record and degree audit.
users.expertise: Expert in academic policy and records; accountable for accuracy of the permanent transcript.

users.context: Guides students on degree planning, monitors progress and at-risk indicators, approves registration overrides.
users.expertise: Expert in program requirements; consumes progress dashboards and early-alert flags.

users.context: Monitors child's grades, attendance, and communications; consents to activities and data use. Infrequent, mobile, privacy-sensitive.
users.expertise: Novice; needs simple, glanceable summaries and clear consent.

users.context: Configures and oversees timed exams, manages academic-integrity flags and accommodations, handles incidents.
users.expertise: Expert in assessment policy and integrity tooling.

workflows.name: Assignment submission and grading
steps: Instructor posts assignment with rubric and deadline
Student submits work before deadline (with late policy)
Instructor grades against rubric and leaves feedback

workflows.name: Online quiz / timed exam delivery
steps: Configure question pool, timing, and attempts

workflows.name: Enrolment / registration
steps: Open registration window with eligibility checks
Student selects courses against prerequisites and capacity
Confirm schedule and update official record

workflows.name: Grade finalisation and transcript posting
steps: Instructor submits final grades by deadline
Handle grade changes via controlled workflow

risks: Submission lost or rejected at the deadline due to timing/timezone or upload failure
Wrong grade posted or gradebook miscalculation affecting GPA and standing
Timed-exam answers lost on disconnect or premature auto-submit
Student or parent accessing another student's records (privacy breach)
Accommodation (extra time, screen reader) not applied, disadvantaging a student
Unauthorised grade change without an audit trail
Academic-integrity false positive penalising an honest student
Enrolment override bypassing prerequisites, harming academic progress
Inaccessible content excluding students with disabilities
Missed registration/add-drop deadline with financial and academic consequences
environment_constraints: Hard deadlines and timezone differences across distributed learners
Wide range of devices, bandwidth, and assistive technologies
High-stakes moments (exams, grade posting) with low error tolerance
Long grading sessions inviting fatigue errors
domain_patterns: Deadline and late-policy enforcement with timezone clarity
Timed assessment with auto-save and resume
Official-record locking and controlled grade-change workflow
audit_compliance: GDPR for EU students and minors
Title IX and equity considerations where relevant
accessibility_concerns: Full WCAG 2.1 AA conformance for learners with disabilities
Captioning and transcripts for video/audio content
Keyboard and screen-reader operable assessments; no colour-only feedback
Readable structure and alt text for course materials
Plain-language deadlines with explicit timezone display
anti_patterns: Silent submission failure at the deadline with no confirmation receipt
Timed exams without auto-save or resume after disconnect
Editable grades with no change-history/audit trail
Inaccessible PDFs and uncaptioned media as primary content
Exposing classmates' grades or identities via insecure references
Ignoring accommodation settings in assessment delivery
